name: Tabbouli Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Mint, fresh chopped or 2 teaspoons Mint, dry crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over the Bulgur wheat in a bowl and let stand for one hour.
2. Drain well and return the wheat to the bowl.
3. Add the vegetable oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper, parsley, mint (either fresh chopped or dry crumbled), green onions, and tomatoes.
4. Blend all ingredients together until well combined.
5. Chill in the refrigerator for at least two hours before serving on a bed of lettuce.
